commands.review_summary:
The branch adds sandbox posture policy evidence, doctor checks, tests, and docs on top of the still-open tool-posture policy stack.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new policy capability rather than a current-main bug. The available verification is source review plus real CLI proof of the proposed policy behavior.

target.title: Policy: add sandbox posture conformance checks
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds policy `sandbox` rules for config-level sandbox posture conformance.
- Records `sandboxPosture` evidence for `agents.defaults.sandbox.*` and `agents.list[].sandbox.*`.
- Documents the new policy syntax:

```jsonc
{
  "sandbox": {
    "requireMode": ["all", "non-main"],
    "allowBackends": ["docker", "openshell"],
    "docker": {
      "denyNetworks": ["host", "container:*"],
      "requireBindMode": "ro",
      "denyDockerSocketBinds": true,
      "denyUnconfinedProfiles": true
    },
    "browser": {
      "requireCdpSourceRange": true
    }
  }
}
```

Stacked after #85482. This stays in the same policy-conformance lane: it checks authored OpenClaw config and reports drift through policy/doctor findings. It does not inspect live containers, host filesystem permissions, process state, or network state, and it does not add runtime enforcement.

## Verification

- `git log --show-signature -1 --format=fuller`
  - signed commit `96ddb7ab9a58f6efa275b89a33c5f211f2e5abc5`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
  - 165 tests passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/policy/src/policy-state.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts docs/cli/policy.md docs/plugins/reference/policy.md`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx docs/cli/policy.md docs/plugins/reference/policy.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `codex review --base fork/policy-tool-posture-conformance`
  - clean: no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Policy can now express sandbox posture requirements for mode, backend, Docker network, Docker bind mode, Docker socket binds, Docker unconfined profiles, and sandbox browser CDP source range.
Real environment tested: WSL checkout at `/root/src/openclaw-policy-sandbox-posture`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`; `pnpm docs:check-mdx docs/cli/policy.md docs/plugins/reference/policy.md`; `git diff --check`; `codex review --base fork/policy-tool-posture-conformance`.
Evidence after fix: Policy tests exercise malformed `sandbox` rule shapes, denied sandbox config findings, accepted matching sandbox config, browser-specific bind evidence, shared sandbox-scope behavior, explicit agent sandbox-scope precedence, CLI output, and policy-state evidence.
Observed result after fix: 165 focused policy tests passed; docs MDX check passed; whitespace check passed; Codex review reported no actionable correctness issues.
What was not tested: Live Docker/browser containers were not launched because this PR intentionally checks config conformance only, not runtime sandbox behavior.
